productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's White Red Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white t-shirt with a red collar and Tigger printWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitAn enthusiastic Tigger print sets the happy mood in this white shirt with a red collar from disney. The thin red print along the sleeves and blue lining along the base gives a sporty look to this 100% cotton tee that will keep your tiny tot cool and dry this summer.
